implemented: KRX Data Marketplace provider (OTP+CSV, EUC-KR decode, LOGOUT guard)
NASDAQ Symbol Directory provider (nasdaqlisted.txt + otherlisted.txt pipe parsing)
Yahoo Finance chart API provider (OHLCV parsing, .KS/.KQ suffix, BRK.B→BRK-B normalization)
SearchService with prefix-first ranking, 24h master cache, 60s quote cache, stale fallback
FastAPI lifespan preload task for master lists
TypeScript types: SearchCandidate, SearchResponse, StockDetail, ChartBar, ChartResponse
useStockSearch hook (300ms debounce, AbortController, ignore flag)
useStockDetail hook (symbol→full fetch, period→chart-only fetch, prevRef pattern)
DashboardTab extracted from App.tsx with identical behavior
StockDetailPanel with OHLC grid, stale/unavailable banners
StockChart: pure SVG candlestick+volume, 0-divide guard, empty state overlay
SearchTab: 4-category segmented control, autocomplete, detail+chart layout
64 tests total (46 backend + 18 frontend), all passing
risks: KRX provider depends on unofficial CSV download; OTP structure may change
Yahoo Finance is an unofficial API endpoint; may change without notice
NASDAQ symbol directory only covers major US exchanges; OTC stocks not included
Korean stock master on weekends/holidays may behave differently (empty response → lazy retry)
future_improvements: Add mouseover tooltips to SVG chart
Consider Recharts/Lightweight Charts for richer chart interactions
Add persistent DB cache for symbol masters to survive process restart
Add scheduled symbol master refresh (e.g. daily cron)
